title: polystichum neozelandicum subsp. neozelandicum
intro: Polystichum neozelandicum subsp. neozelandicum, also known as Mountain Fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of wounds and infections. The health benefits of Mountain Fern include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote tissue repair, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health concerns. The herbal preparations of Mountain Fern typically involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or tincture, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
